summary: Cleanup post-audit Red Team. Operator-facing surface clarified : audit-meta-setup renamed to audit-meta-account, ghost skill references dropped, manifesto restructured with DTC use case upfront, multi-operator workaround for 2-5 person agencies documented, on-demand benchmark-tokens skill flagged as planned. GitHub canon files added (LICENSE MIT, CONTRIBUTING, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, .github templates). docs/internal/ structure clarified with explicit contributor banners, release manifests moved to docs/internal/releases/manifest/. Doctrine refs to internal sessions and decision IDs swept from docs/system/. Stubs added : connected-sources.json (workspace + brand), brands/_TEMPLATE/angles/.
